name: UI Icons
description: Generic icon manager for Drupal that integrates third-party icon packs and exposes them across Drupal's display tools; ships the icon_autocomplete form element.
submodules: ui_icons_patterns: Icons integration with UI Patterns 1.x and 2.x.
ui_icons_backport: Deprecated empty placeholder; API backport for Drupal before 11.1.
ui_icons_field: Provides an Icon field type and Link field integration.
ui_icons_media: Media integration allowing icons as a media type.
ui_icons_picker: Fancy visual icon picker widget for the UI Icons selector.
ui_icons_library: Admin overview page listing all icons available on the site.
ui_icons_font: FontExtractor plugin to define icon packs from web fonts.
ui_icons_text: Text-filter integration to embed icons in filtered content.
ui_icons_menu: Menu UI integration to attach icons to menu links.
ui_icons_ckeditor5: CKEditor 5 plugin to embed icons in rich text.
ui_icons_iconify_api: Deprecated empty placeholder; replaced by the Iconify Icons module.
ui_icons_field_link_attributes: Link-with-attributes (link_attributes) integration for icon fields.
ui_icons_field_linkit: Linkit integration for icon fields.
ui_icons_field_linkit_attributes: Linkit-with-attributes integration for icon fields.
